chapter_title.en: His immigration to Medina, following Muhammad''s

text: فَجَعَلْتُ أَتْبَعُ مَأْخَذَ رَسُولِ الله (صلى الله عليه وآله) فَأَطَأُ ذِكْرَهُ، حَتَّى انْتَهَيْتُ إِلَى الْعَرَجِ.

en.sayed-ali-raza: I began following the path adopted by the Prophet and treading on the lines of his remembrance till I reached al-‘Arj.
